rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §30.082, which governs employment of a director of services for students who are deaf or hard of hearing.
quote: Sec. 30.082. DIRECTOR OF SERVICES. To carry out legislative intent and the objectives of Section 30.081, the agency shall employ a director of services to students who are deaf or hard of hearing.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to the proposed property tax change.
